Who We Are

Donate
Why join The Kettle Society?
The Kettle Society is looking for those that are passionate about mental health!  Those that want to make a positive difference in the lives of people living with mental illness, poverty, and homelessness.  Being leaders in the community of over 40 years, the vast services we provide are deeply impactful to the community.

Join our team!  The Kettle Society is seeking caring individuals who are passionate about mental health, and whose values align with ours:

We value safety.

We value a client-centered approach.

We value a non-judgmental, respectful and compassionate approach.

We value every person’s right to the dignity of having a home.

We value professional integrity and consistency.

Our competitive benefits include  (for those who qualify):

Extended Medical and Dental (employer-paid for Part and Full Time employees)

Life Insurance 

Long Term Disability 

Accidental Death and Dismemberment Insurance (AD&D)

Municipal Pension Plan (MPP) for those eligible 

24/7 Employee Family Assistance Program

Enhanced Disability Management Program for those eligible

Amazing time-off plans to promote work/life balance

On-going Training and Development; including:  Mental Health First Aid
